series_metadata.series_description: Training original sign-in sheets, post sign-in sheets, receivables reports and worhshop evaluation summary.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in active area for one year, then Microfilm. Destroy paper copy after Microfilm has been check for quality and completeness. ; Microform: Retain Microfilm for nine years, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Trash
